title: 諦めないで！　可能性は無限大！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the shopping district on my day off.
While there, I hear some kind of commotion
unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Bento Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I made such a huge error... There's
no way I'll be able to use up all this rice! What
should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, that sounds tough. But don't beat
yourself up. Everyone makes mistakes, you know.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
We just need to think outside the box! And I
know just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: First, we put up a poster... Okay, there we go!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! Get your boxed lunches here! Only
500 yen! And for just 100 yen more, you'll get
double the rice!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
And there's nothing wrong with it, by the way!
You can eat it with total peace of mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, isn't that Pearl over there? She's selling...
bentos?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we get that much for that price? What a
deal! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! We were just thinking of having lunch!
Super size me, por favor!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ♪ One super size bento, coming right
up!

text_block_list.name: Bento Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Wow. I can't believe how much rice the
Umamusume students are buying!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, broadening your horizons opens up all
kinds of possibilities. Never give up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the shopping district, touched by what I've
seen. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, as I arrive at the shopping mall, I notice
an incredibly detailed mannequin. It almost looks
alive...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It... even breathes? I do a double take, and then I
realize...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Pearl?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Th-that was... quite the shock.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho. ♪ We meet again.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Actually, my friend working in retail accidentally
broke a mannequin, so now I'm working part-time
as a temporary mannequin.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can do that?! I've never heard of a job like
that!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The world works in mysterious ways. Ah, but since
I'm a mannequin, I should really stay quiet. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sh-she really is quiet.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, we don't want to get in your way, so
we'll be leaving now. See you, Pearl.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pearl, you were so amazing today! Do you always
spend your days off like that?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I do. You see, I don't want anyone to
squander their potential.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I lead through action. "As long as you
don't give up, a path will reveal itself." That's my
motto!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I just can't help buying into everything
Pearl says.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've received thank-you messages from the
two people I helped today. How sweet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl believes in the power of never
giving up. And it looks like she holds herself to
that principle too.
